nasb.text: for an angel of the Lord went down at certain seasons into the pool and stirred up the water; whoever then first, after the stirring up of the water, stepped in was made well from whatever disease with which he was afflicted.]

ccb.text: 他们都在等候天使来搅动池水。水动时，第一个下去的，无论患什么病都会痊愈。

csbs.text: 因为主的天使按时下到池子里搅动池水。每次水动起来时，第一个下到池子里的人，无论患什么病都会痊愈。
